zh.lifeSummary: Llywellyn ap Ieuan是Ieuan ap Jenkin和Mali ferch Ithel的兒子，於大約1330年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利。他於1378年與Gwenllian Awbrey在威爾士格拉莫爾根拉迪爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1386年在威爾士格拉莫爾根拉迪爾享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Llywellyn ap Ieuan是Ieuan ap Jenkin和Mali ferch Ithel的儿子，于大约1330年出生在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利。他于1378年与Gwenllian Awbrey在威尔士格拉莫爾根拉迪爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1386年在威尔士格拉莫爾根拉迪爾享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Llywellyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: Llywellyn ap Ieuan was born about 1330, in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the son of Ieuan ap Jenkin and Mali ferch Ithel. He married Gwenllian Awbrey in 1378, in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 7 daughters. He died in 1386, in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales, at the age of 57.

fr.of,,Montgomeryshire,Wales: Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Llywellyn ap Ieuan est né environ 1330, à Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fils de Ieuan ap Jenkin et Mali ferch Ithel. Il a épousé Gwenllian Awbrey en 1378, à Radyr, Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en 1386, à Radyr, Glamorgan, Galles, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Llywellyn ap Ieuan wurde um 1330 in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Ieuan ap Jenkin und Mali ferch Ithel geboren. Er hat 1378 in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales Gwenllian Awbrey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 7 Töchter. Er starb 1386 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Llywellyn ap Ieuan è nato il circa 1330 nel Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito come figlio di Ieuan ap Jenkin e Mali ferch Ithel. Lui sposato Gwenllian Awbrey nel 1378, nel Radyr, Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1386, nel Radyr, Glamorgan, Galles, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Llywellyn ap Ieuanは約1330年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアモントゴメリーでIeuan ap JenkinとMali ferch Ithelの息子として生まれた。1378年にウェールズグラモーガンラディルでGwenllian Awbreyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1386年にウェールズグラモーガンラディルで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Llywellyn ap Ieuan(은)는 대략 1330년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 몽고메리에서 Ieuan ap Jenkin(와)과 Mali ferch Ithel의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1378년 웨일스 글램르건 라디르에서 Gwenllian Awbrey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1386년 웨일스 글램르건 라디르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Gwenllian Awbrey em 1378, em Radyr, Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1386, em Radyr, Glamorgan, Gales, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Llywellyn ap Ieuan родился около 1330 г. в местности монтгомири, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Ieuan ap Jenkin и Mali ferch Ithel. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian Awbrey в 1378 г. в местности радир, глэморган, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей. Он умер в 1386 г. в местности радир, глэморган, Уэльс в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Llywellyn ap Ieuan nació aproximadamente 1330, en Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido como hijo de Ieuan ap Jenkin y Mali ferch Ithel. Se casó con Gwenllian Awbrey en 1378, en Radyr, Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 7 hijas. Murió en 1386, en Radyr, Glamorgan, Gales, a la edad de 57 años.
